nasb.text: So they both went until they came to Bethlehem. And when they had come to Bethlehem, all the city was stirred because of them, and the women said, “Is this Naomi?”

esv.text: So the two of them went on until they came to Bethlehem. And when they came to Bethlehem, the whole town was stirred because of them. And the women said, “Is this Naomi?”

cnv.text: 她們雙雙上路，來到伯利恆。她們到達的時候，全城都因她們的緣故騷動起來。婦女們說：“這是拿俄米嗎？”

ccb.text: 于是，二人便一同回到伯利恒。她们进了伯利恒，全城惊动。妇女们问：“这不是拿俄米吗？”

csbs.text: 于是她们两个人继续走，一直来到伯利恒。她们来到伯利恒的时候，整个城都因她们轰动了；妇女们说：“这是娜娥米吗？”
